# Get Dont Destroy On Load

**Menu:** `Actions/Object/Properties`

**Serialized name:** `GetDontDestroyOnLoad`

**Source class:** `C:/Users/Lucas/AndroidStudioProjects/ITsMagic/ITsMagicEngine V2/app/src/main/java/com/itsmagic/engine/Engines/Engine/NoCode/Nodes/Actions/ObjectRelated/Properties/GetDontDestroyOnLoadNode.java`

## Purpose

Reads the value related to `Dont Destroy On Load` and exposes the result on the node outputs.
